name: agentctx-skill
description: AgentCtx skill: make repositories ready for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, Copilot, Cursor, Windsurf, Amp, Aider, Cline, Roo Code, Continue, OpenHands, Replit Agent, and generic AI coding agents.

scripts.smoke: node skills/agentctx/scripts/agentctx.mjs scan --root examples/nextjs-app && node skills/agentctx/scripts/agentctx.mjs generate --root examples/nextjs-app --dry-run && node skills/agentctx/scripts/agentctx.mjs doctor --root examples/nextjs-app && node skills/agentctx/scripts/agentctx.mjs pack "add login with Google OAuth" --root examples/nextjs-app --stdout
scripts.validate: npm run check:scripts && npm test && npm run smoke
scripts.publish:check: npm run validate && npm run pack:dry-run

author: Rahul Kolekar
